findings.details: High-sensitivity data (15,000 records) was exported to a non-encrypted USB drive during off-hours, potentially violating GDPR Article 32 requirements for data protection.

findings.details: Unauthorized export of high-sensitivity data to a USB drive may be considered a material weakness under SOX 302, requiring additional audit and controls.
